hypothesis: EXPLORATORY: Within the high-anxiety subgroup (STAI-T >= 45), trait anxiety predicts amygdala-mPFC resting-state functional connectivity.
rationale: Whole-cohort null (r=0.05, p=0.66, N=80) may mask signal restricted to clinically-anxious participants. This is an exploratory subgroup analysis; it does not replace the confirmatory whole-cohort null.

steps.description: Compute seed-based functional connectivity right amygdala -> mPFC on the STAI-T >= 45 subset.
